claim_boundary: End-to-end numerical accuracy is a PyTorch functional oracle. STAGE consumes the exact Conv/im2col and FC layer shapes for cycle/data-movement feasibility; pooling/ReLU numerical execution is not claimed as a STAGE neural-network kernel.
